headline: Does Insulet (PODD) Elevate Its Diabetes Tech Edge With Panos Steering Global Commercial Strategy?
summary: Insulet recently appointed Mike Panos as Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer, adding a seasoned medical technology leader to oversee its global commercial strategy and execution. This leadership change comes on the heels of strong quarterly results powered by Insulet’s tubeless Pod insulin technology, underscoring an effort to strengthen commercial capabilities as diabetes technology gains momentum. Now we’ll assess how Panos’s appointment to lead Insulet’s global...
